code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut start = 0 - 1
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if start >= 0
          let tok = string.substring(s, start, i)
          match string.parse_int(tok)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          start = 0 - 1
        end
      else
        if start < 0
          start = i
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if start >= 0
    let tok = string.substring(s, start, n)
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn build_output(_ nums: List<Int>, _ t: Int) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  for x in nums
    if x > t
      if first
        out = "#{x}"
        first = false
      else
        out = "#{out} #{x}"
      end
    end
  end
  out
end

fn run(_ line1: String, _ line2: String) -> Unit
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(t)
    println(build_output(nums, t))
  when None
    println("")
  end
end

match io.read_line()
when Some(line1)
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line2)
    run(line1, line2)
  when None
    println("")
  end
when None
  println("")
end
